MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15064050) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONILLA, HUMBERTO KANTU ROMERO, GRICELDA ***(PLAINTIFF GRICELDA ROMERO -- ORDER DENYING FEE WAIVER 8/13/14. FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID BUT SHE MUST PAY FEES TO THE COURT BEFORE FILING ANY DOCUMENTS.)***

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS ADIB KHOURI, ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC, DIANA KHOURI, ISSA KHOURI AND FAIQJ KHOURI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE RETALIATION CAUSE OF ACTION; PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT DEMURRER HAS MERIT. DEMURER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE WHICH EXPRESS TERM OF THE CONTRACT IS BREACHED. TO THE EXTENT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED ON THE BREACH OF THE IMPLIED WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS BREACH OF WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY IS ALLEGED AS THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO (1) THE B&P 17200 CAUSE OF ACTION, IT IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED; (2) NUISANCE CAUSE OF ACTION, IT IS NOT DUPLICATIVE OF THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION; (3) SFRO 37.3 VIOLATION; THIS CAUSE OF ACTION AND THE FACTS ON WHICH IT IS BASED WERE ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT FILED ON JUNE 20, 2014 BEFORE EXPIRATION OF THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS; (4) SFRO 37.10B VIOLATION IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. SFRP 37.10B DOES NOT HAVE A REQUIREMENT THAT THE CIVIL ACTION FOR ITS VIOLATION MAY ONLY BE BROUGHT IF TENANT HARASSMENT IS A PART OF A PLAN TO GET A TENANT TO VACATE. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances by Phil Yeager, Esq. and Victoria Townsend, Esq. for Defendants. No appearance by Plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed by Plaintiff, the Court orders case dismissed with prejudice pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA MING MEI LEE; Clerk MOlopernes/KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-05-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ian Booth Kelley, Esq. (415-581-0889) for Plaintiff/Opposing party Crystal Cook.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff requests the First amended complaint as amended to be deemed the Operative complaint. The Court denies the Request. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS ADIB KHOURI, ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC, DIANA KHOURI, ISSA KHOURI and FAIQJ KHOURI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the retaliation cause of action; Plaintiff concedes that demurrer has merit. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend the breach of contract cause of action to allege which express term of the contract is breached. To the extent this cause of action is based on the breach of the implied warranty of habitability the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as breach of warranty of habitability is alleged as the first cause of action. Demurrer is overruled as to (1) the B&P 17200 cause of action, it is sufficiently alleged; (2) nuisance cause of action, it is not duplicative of the negligence cause of action; (3) SFRO 37.3 violation; this cause of action and the facts on which it is based were alleged in the complaint filed on June 20, 2014 before expiration of the statute of limitations; (4) SFRO 37.10B violation is sufficiently alleged. SFRP 37.10B does not have a requirement that the civil action for its violation may only be brought if tenant harassment is a part of a plan to get a tenant to vacate. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
